name: VanityBlack premium electric cosmetic bed
shortDescription: Eclipse 3-motor electric cosmetic chair. Remote-controlled height, backrest, and cradle adjustment, 180° armrests, water-repellent faux leather, 2.3 m extended length.
description:
The VanityBlack Eclipse electric cosmetic chair is a true premium piece of furniture for professional salons.

Its three powerful motors allow precise, stepless adjustment of the height, backrest, and cradle position via remote control. The 180° adjustable armrests facilitate getting in and out, and the manually adjustable footrest provides additional comfort.

When fully extended, the chair length exceeds 2.3 meters, making it ideal for taller clients as well. The matte-finish, water-repellent faux leather cover is hygienic, easy to clean, and extremely durable.

Ideal choice for beauty salons, spa centers, and medical aesthetic clinics.
metaTitle: VanityBlack premium electric cosmetic bed | 3 motors
metaDescription: VanityBlack Eclipse 3-motor electric cosmetic chair. Remote control, 2.3 m length, water-repellent faux leather. Premium salon furniture for salons and clinics.

final.headline: Interested in the VanityBlack cosmetic bed?

featureRows.headline: Why is the VanityBlack the premium choice?
featureRows.subtitle: Luxury comfort and professional functionality in a single piece of furniture

features.title: 3-motor electric adjustment
features.description: The height, backrest, and cradle can each be adjusted individually and steplessly with the remote control. No manual pumping, no compromises – the perfect position can be set in moments for any treatment.
features.highlight: Precise, quiet motor adjustment – comfortable for both client and operator.

features.title: Maximum client comfort
features.description: The soft foam-filled seat surface, extendable headrest, and 2.3-meter extended length ensure that every client – even taller ones – receives maximum comfort. The 180° movable armrests facilitate getting in and out.
features.highlight: 2.3-meter length – perfect for tall clients too.

features.title: Premium materials and hygiene
features.description: The matte-finish, water-repellent faux leather cover is not only elegant but extremely practical: easy to clean, disinfect, and maintains its appearance long-term. The sturdy base provides stability even under intensive use.

testimonials.name: Németh Vivien
testimonials.text: The VanityBlack bed is a true dream! <mark>My clients love the comfort, and the motorized adjustment is incredibly practical</mark> – I can fine-tune the position even during treatment. The water-repellent faux leather is fantastic, clean in an instant.

expertQuote.quote: A 3-motor electric cosmetic bed is the essential furniture of a professional salon. The VanityBlack Eclipse not only elevates client comfort to a new level but also makes the operator's work easier and more ergonomic.
expertQuote.author: Horváth László

faq.question: What treatments is the VanityBlack suitable for?
faq.answer: The VanityBlack is a universal cosmetic bed suitable for facial treatments, body treatments, laser procedures, mesotherapy, and any aesthetic treatment where the client is in a lying or semi-sitting position.

faq.question: How does the motorized adjustment work?
faq.answer: The three motors are controlled via the remote: separate buttons adjust the height, backrest angle, and cradle position. The movement is quiet and stepless.

faq.question: What is the weight capacity?
faq.answer: The VanityBlack is designed for professional use with its sturdy base and powerful motors, suitable for intensive daily use.

faq.question: How can the water-repellent faux leather be cleaned?
faq.answer: The matte-finish, water-repellent faux leather surface can be easily wiped down with a damp cloth or surface disinfectant. Water and treatment materials do not absorb, so hygiene is always ensured.

faq.question: Is assembly required?
faq.answer: The VanityBlack arrives pre-assembled. The base and armrests need to be attached, which can be done in a few minutes with the included tools.
